content:
CALL TRANSCRIPT
Customer: Fairview Legal Group
Customer ID: C009
Contract ID: K019
Account Executive: Tom Rivera
Call Type: Expansion Planning Call
Date: September 15, 2025
Participants: Tom Rivera (AE), Claire Osei (Managing Partner), David Park (Director of Operations)

Tom Rivera: Claire, David — mid-year check-in. You're one of our fastest-growing accounts. I wanted to make sure we're ahead of anything you need.

Claire Osei: Tom, David has been leading an internal review of how we can extend InsightIQ further into the firm. David, walk Tom through where we are.

David Park: We've been looking at rolling the platform out to the paralegals. There are 14 of them and they're currently locked out of the dashboards. They spend a meaningful amount of time pulling data manually that InsightIQ already has.

Tom Rivera: That's a clean use case. 14 more users at the Enterprise rate would bring you to 44 users. I can have a proposal to you this week.

Claire Osei: Before you do — the Atlanta firm I mentioned. They've been watching what we've been doing and their managing partner reached out to me last month. They're interested in a demo.

Tom Rivera: That's great news. I'll reach out directly and mention the referral. We have a referral credit program — I'll make sure that's factored in for you.

David Park: One thing I want to raise. We've had occasional slowness when generating large reports — matters with a lot of associated documents. Is that a known issue?

Tom Rivera: It can happen with very large document sets. There's a setting in the report builder that queues large reports for background processing rather than running them live — it delivers to your inbox when ready. I'll send you the instructions after this call.

David Park: That would help. The partners have been complaining about it.

Tom Rivera: I'll make sure you have it today.
